Off Calendar Oct-30-2017 Continued To Nov-09-17 At 01:00 P.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-02-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, John E. Stringer of the law office of John E. Stringer (415-934-1827) appears as counsel for plaintiff/opposing party

Attorney, Christopher M. McDonald of the law offices of Phillips Spallas & Angstadt LLP (415-278-9400) appears as counsel for defendant/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter

Stipulation and order appointing temporary judge is signed and filed.

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides. The Court confirms the tentative ruling with modification.

DEFENDANT GREGORY TESHARA'S Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And Request For Monetary Sanctions is Granted in part and DENIED in part. The motion to compel responses is GRANTED. Plaintiff is ordered to provide responses, further responses and verification thereof within seven (7) days from this date. Request for Monetary Sanctions is DENIED. Written order is signed and filed in open court. See Scanned Document for details.

Judge Pro Tem: Charles Geerhart: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (DISC302)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-28-2016 Set For Trial On Nov-20-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses, Document Production, And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-21-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
John E. Stringer, of Law Office of John E. Stringer, Tel. 415.934.1827, for plaintiffs;
Christopher M. McDonald, of Phillips, Spallas & Angstadt LLP, Tel. 415.278.9400, for defendants.

Ruling: A R G U E D. DEFENDANT GREGORY TESHARA Motion To Compel Discovery Responses, Document Production is granted in part. Monetary Sanctions are awarded to defendant in the amount of $800. Prevailing party shall prepare form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312. Judge Pro Tem: Tom Cohen; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-14-2016 Set For Trial On Sep-25-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
